source_text:
(8) 自2019年起，其他市場的年化新保費及新業務價值包括我們於
Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Limited (Tata AIA Life)所持
49%股權的應佔業績。2018年或以前所呈報的年化新保費及新業
務價值並無重列，並且不包括來自Tata AIA Life的任何貢獻。
自2019年起，本集團新業務價值不包括非控股權益應佔的新業務
價值。2018年或以前的新業務價值並無重列 ，如早前所披露，
並未扣除非控股權益。Tata AIA Life的國際財務報告準則業績乃
採用權益會計法計算。本集團的合併財務報表使用按滯後一個
季度基準的Tata AIA Life財務資料。為明確起見，總加權保費
收入不包括來自Tata AIA Life的任何貢獻。

initial_translation: (8) From 2019 onwards, ANP and VONB for other markets include our share of results from our 49% equity interest in Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Limited (Tata AIA Life). ANP and VONB reported in 2018 or earlier have not been restated and do not include any contribution from Tata AIA Life. From 2019 onwards, the Group's VONB excludes VONB attributable to non-controlling interests. VONB for 2018 or earlier has not been restated and, as previously disclosed, was not adjusted for non-controlling interests. Tata AIA Life's International Financial Reporting Standards results are calculated using the equity method. The Group's consolidated financial statements use Tata AIA Life financial data on a one-quarter lag basis. For clarity, total weighted premium income does not include any contribution from Tata AIA Life.

source_text:
友邦保險在亞洲歷史悠久，源遠流長，經歷各種社會動盪和不明朗時期仍能妥善管理業務，因而贏得卓著的
聲譽，體現友邦保險誠可信賴、強韌穩健，並堅持為持分者做對的事。自2020年初以來，2019冠狀病毒病大流
行導致營商環境不斷變化及日趨複雜，而政治、宏觀經濟及資本市場亦出現前所未見的轉移。在這樣的環境下，
友邦保險的財務實力，以及「幫助大眾活出健康、長久、好生活」的目標，更具重大意義。本人衷心感謝友邦
保險所有員工、代理和合作夥伴，即使面對最嚴峻的挑戰，他們仍關懷社區，克盡己職，專心致志地為客戶、

initial_translation: AIA has a long and storied history in Asia. Through various periods of social upheaval and uncertainty, we have managed our business prudently and earned a distinguished reputation, demonstrating that AIA is trustworthy, resilient and steadfast in doing the right thing for our stakeholders. Since early 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic has created a constantly evolving and increasingly complex business environment, with unprecedented shifts in the political, macroeconomic and capital markets landscape. In such circumstances, AIA's financial strength and our purpose of helping people live healthier, longer, better lives take on even greater significance. I am deeply grateful to all AIA employees, agents and partners who, despite facing the most severe challenges, have continued to care for our communities, fulfilled their responsibilities with dedication, and remained focused on serving our customers,
compact_translation: AIA has a long and storied history in Asia. Through various periods of social upheaval and uncertainty, we have managed our business prudently and earned a distinguished reputation, demonstrating that AIA is trustworthy, resilient and steadfast in doing the right thing for our stakeholders. Since early 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic has created a constantly evolving and increasingly complex business environment, with unprecedented shifts in the political, macroeconomic and capital markets landscape. In such circumstances, AIA's financial strength and our purpose of helping people live healthier, longer, better lives take on even greater significance. source_text:
稅後營運溢利增長5%至59.42億美元，產生的基本自由盈餘則上升7%至58.43億美元，反映我們擁有高質素的
經常性盈利來源。內涵價值權益創新高，達672億美元。截至2020年12月31日，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為
374%，足證我們雄厚的資本實力和嚴謹的財務管理。

source_text:
在2020年第四季，我們慶祝友邦保險在香港聯交所上市10週年。回顧當年友邦保險的上市刷新多項紀錄，至今
仍是全球保險業界規模最大的首次公開招股。能夠與董事會成員並肩合作，本人深感榮幸和欣慰。友邦保險的
業務在此期間繼往開來，不斷擴展，成為以市值計全球最大的人壽保險公司。

initial_translation: In the fourth quarter of 2020, we celebrated AIA's tenth anniversary of listing on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. Looking back, AIA's listing set multiple records at the time and remains the largest initial public offering in the global insurance industry to date. I feel privileged and gratified to work alongside the Board members. AIA's business has continued to grow and expand during this period, becoming the world's largest life insurance company by market capitalisation.

initial_translation: One of the Board's key responsibilities is to ensure a strong pipeline of leadership talent and to execute effective succession planning. We are pleased to welcome Mr. Lee Yuen Cheung as Group Chief Executive Officer and President, succeeding Mr. Wong King Fai upon his retirement on 1 June 2020. On behalf of the Board, I would like to express our deep appreciation to Mr. Lee Yuen Cheung and his management team for their outstanding leadership during this unprecedented environment, as they continue to drive our business forward. We also wish to extend our heartfelt thanks to Mr. Wong King Fai
compact_translation: One of the Board's key responsibilities is ensuring a strong pipeline of leadership talent and executing effective succession planning. We are pleased to welcome Mr. Lee Yuen Cheung as Group Chief Executive Officer and President, succeeding Mr. Wong King Fai upon his retirement on 1 June 2020. On behalf of the Board, I express our deep appreciation to Mr. Lee Yuen Cheung and his management team for their outstanding leadership during this unprecedented environment as they drive our business forward. We also extend our heartfelt thanks to Mr. Wong King Fai
final_translation: One of the Board's key responsibilities is to ensure a strong pipeline of leadership talent and to execute effective succession planning. We are pleased to welcome Mr. Lee Yuen Cheung as Group Chief Executive Officer and President, succeeding Mr. Wong King Fai upon his retirement on 1 June 2020. On behalf of the Board, I would like to express our deep appreciation to Mr. Lee Yuen Cheung and his management team for their outstanding leadership during this unprecedented environment, as they continue to drive our business forward. We also wish to extend our heartfelt thanks to Mr. Wong King Fai

source_text:
環境、社會及管治議題對全球的影響日形重要。我們當竭盡所能，協助推動社會邁向更美好的未來，而我們的環
境、社會及管治措施在2020年再度備受肯定。根據評級機構Sustainalytics的評選，友邦保險在超過270家保險公
司中排名第二，足證我們卓越的企業管治實力和質素。此外，我們繼續榮獲Institutional Shareholder Services
Inc.(ISS)頒發「Prime」環境、社會及管治企業評級(ESG Corporate Rating)，認同我們為業界可持續發展表現
最佳的公司之一。我們相信我們在這方面仍需採取更多措施，為社區實現更美好的成果。這仍是我個人與董事會

initial_translation: Environmental, Social and Governance issues are becoming increasingly important to the world. We will do our utmost to help drive society towards a better future, and our Environmental, Social and Governance initiatives were once again recognized in 2020. According to the selection by rating agency Sustainalytics, AIA ranked second among over 270 insurance companies, demonstrating our excellent corporate governance strength and quality. In addition, we continued to receive the "Prime" Environmental, Social and Governance Corporate Rating (ESG Corporate Rating) from Institutional Shareholder Services Inc. (ISS), recognizing us as one of the best-performing companies in the industry for sustainable development. We believe we still need to take more measures in this regard to achieve better outcomes for the community. This remains a personal priority for me and the Board.
compact_translation: Environmental, Social and Governance issues are increasingly important globally. We are committed to driving society towards a better future, and our ESG initiatives were recognized again in 2020. According to Sustainalytics, AIA ranked second among over 270 insurance companies, demonstrating our excellent corporate governance. Additionally, we continued to receive the "Prime" ESG Corporate Rating from Institutional Shareholder Services Inc. (ISS), recognizing us as one of the industry's best-performing companies for sustainable development. We believe further measures are needed to achieve better outcomes for the community. This remains a priority for me and the Board.
final_translation: Environmental, Social and Governance issues are increasingly important globally. Additionally, we continued to receive the "Prime" ESG Corporate Rating from Institutional Shareholder Services Inc. (ISS), recognizing us as one of the industry's best-performing companies for sustainable development. We believe further measures are needed to achieve better outcomes for the community. This remains a priority for me and the Board.

source_text:
今天，客戶對友邦保險產品、服務及高質素建議日益增長的需求從未如此殷切。我們的策略建基於亞洲強勁的
結構性增長動力，並獲多項因素支持，包括前所未見的財富創造、保障缺口迅速擴大、消費者取向持續轉變、
數碼技術普及，以及市場聚焦於長遠的可持續發展。董事會充滿信心，友邦保險具備優越條件，把握區內展現的
龐大機遇，在客戶及其家庭最需要的時刻提供財務保障，使其安心無憂，並同時為所有持分者創造共享價值。

initial_translation: Today, customer demand for AIA's products, services and high-quality advice has never been more pressing. Our strategy is built on Asia's strong structural growth drivers and is supported by multiple factors, including unprecedented wealth creation, rapidly widening protection gaps, evolving consumer preferences, widespread digital technology adoption, and market focus on long-term sustainable development. The Board is confident that AIA is well-positioned to seize the significant opportunities presented across the region, providing financial protection to customers and their families when they need it most, giving them peace of mind, while creating shared value for all stakeholders.
compact_translation: Today, customer demand for AIA's products, services and high-quality advice has never been more pressing. Our strategy is built on Asia's strong structural growth drivers supported by unprecedented wealth creation, rapidly widening protection gaps, evolving consumer preferences, widespread digital technology adoption, and market focus on long-term sustainable development. The Board is confident AIA is well-positioned to seize significant opportunities across the region, providing financial protection to customers and their families when needed most, while creating shared value for all stakeholders.
final_translation: Today, customer demand for AIA's products, services and high-quality advice has never been more pressing. 其他資料
財務報表

自疫情大流行開始以來，本集團的各業務團隊反應迅速，積極協助紓緩對社區的影響，同時確保員工安全。本集
團為此廣泛採取多項措拖，包括財政支持、提供醫療物資、免費保障覆蓋、獲取醫療保健資源、精簡服務流程和
加快理賠支付，令我引以為榮。我們一如既往找出每一個可以作出理賠的理由，年內已支付逾160億美元的保險

initial_translation: Since the onset of the pandemic, our business teams across the Group have responded swiftly and actively assisted in mitigating the impact on our communities, while ensuring employee safety. The Group has implemented a wide range of measures to this end, including financial support, provision of medical supplies, complimentary coverage, access to healthcare resources, streamlined service processes and accelerated claims payments, which I am proud of. We have, as always, identified every possible reason to make a claim payment, and during the year we paid out over US$16 billion in insurance
compact_translation: Since the pandemic onset, our business teams responded swiftly and actively assisted in mitigating community impact while ensuring employee safety. The Group implemented a wide range of measures including financial support, medical supplies provision, complimentary coverage, healthcare resource access, streamlined service processes and accelerated claims payments. We identified every possible reason to make claim payments, paying out over US$16 billion in insurance
final_translation: Since the pandemic onset, our business teams responded swiftly and actively assisted in mitigating community impact while ensuring employee safety. The Group implemented a wide range of measures including financial support, medical supplies provision, complimentary coverage, healthcare resource access, streamlined service processes and accelerated claims payments. We identified every possible reason to make claim payments, paying out over US$16 billion in insurance

source_text:
儘管為遏制2019冠狀病毒病傳播的措施導致新業務價值減少至27.65億美元，但隨著外出限制放寬，銷售動力轉
趨正面，並在2021年展開非常強勁的勢頭，首兩個月的新業務價值按年增長15%。我們規模龐大和持續增長的有
效保單組合所帶來的高質素和經常性收入來源，帶動2020年稅後營運溢利增加5%，期內產生的基本自由盈餘則
增長7%。截至2020年12月31日，內涵價值權益創新高，達672億美元，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為374%，足

initial_translation: Despite measures to contain COVID-19 resulting in VONB declining to US$2.765 billion, sales momentum turned positive as lockdown restrictions eased, with a very strong momentum emerging in 2021, with VONB in the first two months growing 15% year-on-year. Our large and growing portfolio of in-force policies generated high-quality and recurring income streams, driving a 5% increase in OPAT in 2020, with UFSG generated during the period growing 7%. As at 31 December 2020, EV Equity reached a record high of US$67.2 billion, with the Group LCSM cover ratio at 374%, which is
compact_translation: Despite COVID-19 containment measures reducing VONB to US$2.765 billion, sales momentum turned positive as lockdown restrictions eased, with strong momentum in early 2021, VONB growing 15% year-on-year in the first two months. Our large and growing in-force policy portfolio generated high-quality recurring income, driving 5% OPAT growth in 2020, with UFSG growing 7%. As at 31 December 2020, EV Equity reached a record US$67.2 billion, with Group LCSM cover ratio at 374%, which is
final_translation: Despite COVID-19 containment measures reducing VONB to US$2.765 billion, sales momentum turned positive as lockdown restrictions eased, with strong momentum in early 2021, VONB growing 15% year-on-year in the first two months. Our large and growing in-force policy portfolio generated high-quality recurring income, driving 5% OPAT growth in 2020, with UFSG growing 7%. As at 31 December 2020, EV Equity reached a record US$67.2 billion, with Group LCSM cover ratio at 374%, which is

This focus, combined with our leadership team's extensive experience in Asia and our employees' exceptional capabilities,

initial_translation: Our unparalleled distribution strength enables us to reach customers directly and provide high-quality professional advice to help meet the substantial and growing long-term protection and savings needs of Asian consumers. AIA possesses a market-leading brand, built on the foundation of helping people achieve their goals of living healthier, longer and better lives.

initial_translation: Despite 2020 being an unprecedented year, I am more optimistic than ever about the prospects for the life insurance industry in Asia and the future of AIA. We continue to challenge ourselves and develop our strategic priorities to ensure we can continue to appropriately meet the evolving expectations and financial needs of our customers. Our new corporate strategy builds on AIA's existing strengths and advances our transformation journey to deliver the best service to our customers in the future.

source_text:
友邦保險中國業務在2020年為本集團新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，並在2021年初表現卓越，與2020年同期比較，
今年首兩個月錄得非常強勁的新業務價值增長。儘管2020年的9.68億美元新業務價值較2019年下降17%，但這主
要由於2019冠狀病毒病在首季爆發初期新銷售有限所致。年內稅後營運溢利增長14%，主要是由於我們日益增長

OPAT growth of 14% during the year was mainly attributable to our increasingly growing

source_text:
在2020年，我們成功獲得監管機搆批復，將上海分公司改建為中國內地首家外資獨資人身保險子公司。於2021年
3月，我們已獲得中國銀行保險監督委員會批復，准予在四川省開業。四川省是中國內地以國內生產總值計的
第六大省份，以人口計為第四大省，為友邦保險帶來重大的長期增長機遇。

initial_translation: In 2020, we successfully obtained regulatory approval to restructure our Shanghai branch into Mainland China's first wholly foreign-owned life insurance subsidiary. In March 2021, we received approval from the China Banking and Insurance Regulatory Commission to commence operations in Sichuan Province. As the sixth largest province in Mainland China by GDP and the fourth largest by population, Sichuan Province presents significant long-term growth opportunities for AIA.
compact_translation: In 2020, we obtained regulatory approval to restructure our Shanghai branch into Mainland China's first wholly foreign-owned life insurance subsidiary. source_text:
香港在2020年2月初實施旅遊限制，來自中國內地訪港旅客的新業務銷售實際上已經停頓，導致新業務價值大幅
下降。與上半年比較，我們的代理分銷來自本地客戶的業務於下半年錄得雙位數字的銷售增長，維持顯著的市場
領導地位。夥伴分銷渠道的新業務價值顯著低於2019年，乃由於透過零售獨立財務顧問渠道的中國內地訪港旅客
過往銷售比重較高。稅後營運溢利增長10%，受惠於續保保費強勁的增長及有利的理賠經驗。

initial_translation: Hong Kong implemented travel restrictions in early February 2020, which effectively halted new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors, resulting in a significant decline in VONB. Compared with the first half, our agency distribution channel achieved double-digit sales growth from local customers in the second half, maintaining a significant market leadership position. The VONB from partnership distribution channels was materially lower than 2019, primarily due to the historically higher proportion of sales from Mainland Chinese visitors through the retail independent financial adviser channel. OPAT grew by 10%, benefiting from strong growth in renewal premiums and favorable claims experience.
compact_translation: Hong Kong implemented travel restrictions in early February 2020, effectively halting new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors and causing significant VONB decline. Agency distribution achieved double-digit sales growth from local customers in H2, maintaining significant market leadership. Partnership distribution VONB was materially lower than 2019 due to historically higher Mainland visitor sales through retail independent financial adviser channels. OPAT grew 10%, driven by strong renewal premium growth and favorable claims experience.
final_translation: Hong Kong implemented travel restrictions in early February 2020, effectively halting new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors and causing significant VONB decline. Agency distribution achieved double-digit sales growth from local customers in H2, maintaining significant market leadership. Partnership distribution VONB was materially lower than 2019 due to historically higher Mainland visitor sales through retail independent financial adviser channels. OPAT grew 10%, driven by strong renewal premium growth and favorable claims experience.

source_text:
中國內地訪港旅客的旅遊限制影響我們的零售獨立財務顧問業務，導致夥伴業務於2020年的新業務價值下降
41%。我們從銀行保險帶來較為堅韌的業績，並為此渠道的新業務價值帶來大部分的貢獻。我們與印尼的Bank
Central Asia (BCA)、泰國的Bangkok Bank Public Company Limited（盤谷銀行）及馬來西亞的Public Bank
Berhad（大眾銀行）的銀行保險夥伴合作，在2020年均錄得新業務價值正增長。

initial_translation: Travel restrictions on Mainland Chinese visitors to Hong Kong impacted our retail independent financial adviser business, resulting in a 41% decline in VONB for our partner business in 2020. We benefited from more resilient performance from bancassurance, which contributed the majority of VONB for this channel. Our bancassurance partnerships with Bank Central Asia (BCA) in Indonesia, Bangkok Bank Public Company Limited in Thailand, and Public Bank Berhad in Malaysia all recorded positive VONB growth in 2020.
compact_translation: Travel restrictions on Mainland Chinese visitors to Hong Kong impacted our retail independent financial adviser business, causing a 41% decline in VONB for our partner business in 2020. Bancassurance delivered more resilient performance, contributing the majority of VONB for this channel. Our bancassurance partnerships with Bank Central Asia (BCA) in Indonesia, Bangkok Bank Public Company Limited in Thailand, and Public Bank Berhad in Malaysia all recorded positive VONB growth in 2020.
final_translation: Travel restrictions on Mainland Chinese visitors to Hong Kong impacted our retail independent financial adviser business, causing a 41% decline in VONB for our partner business in 2020. Bancassurance delivered more resilient performance, contributing the majority of VONB for this channel. Our bancassurance partnerships with Bank Central Asia (BCA) in Indonesia, Bangkok Bank Public Company Limited in Thailand, and Public Bank Berhad in Malaysia all recorded positive VONB growth in 2020.

initial_translation: learning culture and provide platforms for our employees to develop meaningful and valuable careers at AIA. In response to social distancing measures and travel restrictions, we transitioned our learning content to the online "AIA Learning Hub". Our world-class facility, the AIA Leadership Centre (ALC) located in Bangkok, has been redesigned and now delivers our flagship leadership development programme with over 100 fully virtualised learning modules. Participants have provided very positive feedback on these virtual learning programmes, consistent with feedback from previous face-to-face learning sessions.

source_text:
年度員工敬業度指標調查是我們在各市場共同努力所得成果的重要指標，藉此更瞭解和支援員工。在2020年，
97%的員工參與調查，本集團所得的員工敬業度評分升至歷來新高，在蓋洛普環球金融服務及保險業基準中排名
88分位。此外，友邦保險獲列入《福布斯》
「2020年世界最佳僱主榜單」(‘World’s Best Employers 2020’ list)。

initial_translation: Our annual employee engagement survey is a key indicator of the collective efforts we make across our markets to better understand and support our employees. In 2020, 97% of employees participated in the survey, and our Group achieved a record high employee engagement score, ranking at the 88th percentile against the Gallup Global Financial Services and Insurance benchmark. Additionally, AIA was named on Forbes' 'World's Best Employers 2020' list.
compact_translation: Our annual employee engagement survey measures collective efforts across markets to better understand and support employees. In 2020, 97% of employees participated, achieving a record high engagement score at the 88th percentile against the Gallup Global Financial Services and Insurance benchmark. AIA was also named on Forbes' 'World's Best Employers 2020' list.
final_translation: Our annual employee engagement survey measures collective efforts across markets to better understand and support employees. AIA was also named on Forbes' 'World's Best Employers 2020' list.

initial_translation: In October 2020, AIA celebrated its 10th anniversary of listing on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and established the "AIA Scholarship" programme, committing US$100 million to support 100 undergraduate students annually from various universities in Hong Kong over the coming decades, nurturing the next generation of business leaders.

initial_translation: Core components of the 'Organisation of the Future' strategy include strengthening and streamlining the organisational structure, introducing flexible working arrangements, and enhancing the capability framework. These strategic priorities will support employee career development and further strengthen AIA's position as an employer of choice.

source_text:
我們從2020年下半年起，透過友邦保險在新加坡和越南的業務作為兩個試點業務單位，展開塑造一個轉型機構的
旅程。初步成果已實現更簡化、更以客為本的營運模式，我們亦推行靈活的工作方式，設立多個跨職能的專家團
隊。我們計劃在這些試點業務內進行試驗和學習，然後將「未來的組織」項目擴展至其他業務。

initial_translation: Since the second half of 2020, we have embarked on a journey to shape a transformational organization through AIA's businesses in Singapore and Vietnam as two pilot business units. Initial results have delivered a more streamlined and customer-centric operating model, and we have implemented flexible working arrangements and established multiple cross-functional expert teams. We plan to experiment and learn within these pilot businesses before expanding the "Organisation of the Future" programme to other operations.

We plan to experiment and learn within these pilots before expanding the "Organisation of the Future" programme to other operations.

source_text:
過去一個多世紀以來，友邦保險為亞洲客戶的生活帶來正面和持久的影響。我們的社區存在不少環境、社會及管
治議題，包括氣候變化、環境污染及生活模式相關疾病。隨著疫情大流行持續，突顯了這些問題的複雜性。作為
客戶和社區的終身夥伴，我們竭盡所能，推動社會邁向更美好、更可持續的未來。

initial_translation: Over more than a century, AIA has made a positive and lasting impact on the lives of our customers across Asia. Our communities face numerous environmental, social and governance issues, including climate change, environmental pollution and lifestyle-related diseases. As the pandemic continues, it has highlighted the complexity of these challenges. As a lifelong partner to our customers and communities, we are committed to doing our part to drive society towards a better and more sustainable future.

The ongoing pandemic has highlighted the complexity of these challenges. As a lifelong partner to our customers and communities, we are committed to driving society towards a better and more sustainable future.

source_text:
友邦保險參與氣候相關財務披露工作小組(Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures)，這個全球組
織致力就氣候變化影響建立一個自願和一致的披露框架。我們繼續重申對有關建議的承諾，在2020年與我們投資
組合內逾1,400家公司，以及超過30名外部投資經理聯繫，致力影響其如何管理氣候變化風險及應對氣候問題。

initial_translation: AIA participates in the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures, a global organization dedicated to establishing a voluntary and consistent disclosure framework on the impacts of climate change. We continue to reaffirm our commitment to its recommendations, and in 2020 engaged with over 1,400 companies in our investment portfolio and more than 30 external investment managers to influence how they manage climate change risks and address climate-related issues.
compact_translation: AIA participates in the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures, a global organization establishing a voluntary and consistent disclosure framework on climate change impacts. We continue to reaffirm our commitment to its recommendations, engaging in 2020 with over 1,400 companies in our investment portfolio and more than 30 external investment managers to influence their management of climate change risks and climate-related issues.

source_text:
在2020年，2019冠狀病毒病大流行無疑是我們生活記憶中最大規模的公共衞生緊急狀態。受影響的企業和家庭
獲得前所未見的公共財政和金融支援，有助緩解由疫情大流行造成的部分極端金融衝擊，並加快復甦步伐，這在
具備完善衞生政策及基建的國家尤其可見。然而，各國之間存在顯著差異，在這困境下，亞洲（日本除外）地區
錄得全球相對最強勁的國內生產總值表現。現時，環球經濟正剛剛開始擺脫一場深度衰退，並步入好轉的初步階

initial_translation: In 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic was undoubtedly the largest-scale public health emergency in our living memory. Affected businesses and households received unprecedented public financial and financial support, which helped mitigate some of the extreme financial impacts caused by the pandemic and accelerated the pace of recovery, which was particularly evident in countries with well-established health policies and infrastructure. However, there were significant differences between countries, and under these challenging circumstances, Asia (excluding Japan) recorded the relatively strongest gross domestic product performance globally. Currently, the global economy is just beginning to emerge from a deep recession and entering the initial stages of improvement.
compact_translation: In 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic was undoubtedly the largest-scale public health emergency in our living memory. Affected businesses and households received unprecedented public financial support, which helped mitigate some extreme financial impacts caused by the pandemic and accelerated recovery, particularly evident in countries with well-established health policies and infrastructure. However, significant differences existed between countries. Under these challenging circumstances, Asia (excluding Japan) recorded the relatively strongest gross domestic product performance globally. Currently, the global economy is just beginning to emerge from deep recession and entering initial stages of improvement.

However, there were significant differences between countries, and under these challenging circumstances, Asia (excluding Japan) recorded the relatively strongest gross domestic product performance globally. Currently, the global economy is just beginning to emerge from a deep recession and entering the initial stages of improvement.

source_text:
儘管疫情大流行的影響依然沒有結束，但相信2021年將是過渡性的一年，我們對此保持審慎樂觀。市場憧憬推出
疫苗接種計劃和新療法有助降低疫症的感染率和嚴重性，使醫療系統能更有效應對疫情，並降低死亡率。儘管我
們並不預計外出或消費行為於短期內能回復疫情大流行前的水平，但隨著消費者信心恢復，預期復甦範疇將逐步
由製造主導的產業擴展到消費和服務業。這在人口較年輕的國家將尤其可見。

initial_translation: Although the impact of the pandemic has not yet ended, we believe 2021 will be a transitional year and we remain cautiously optimistic. Market expectations for the rollout of vaccination programmes and new therapies are expected to help reduce infection rates and severity of the disease, enabling healthcare systems to respond to the pandemic more effectively and reduce mortality rates. While we do not anticipate that travel and consumer behaviour will return to pre-pandemic levels in the near term, as consumer confidence recovers, the recovery is expected to gradually broaden from manufacturing-led industries to consumption and service sectors. This will be particularly evident in countries with younger populations.
compact_translation: Although the pandemic's impact persists, we believe 2021 will be transitional and remain cautiously optimistic. Market expectations for vaccination programmes and new therapies should reduce infection rates and disease severity, enabling healthcare systems to respond more effectively and lower mortality. While near-term travel and consumer behaviour are unlikely to return to pre-pandemic levels, recovery is expected to broaden from manufacturing-led to consumption and service sectors as consumer confidence recovers. This will be particularly evident in younger-population countries.
final_translation: Although the impact of the pandemic has not yet ended, we believe 2021 will be a transitional year and we remain cautiously optimistic. Market expectations for the rollout of vaccination programmes and new therapies are expected to help reduce infection rates and severity of the disease, enabling healthcare systems to respond to the pandemic more effectively and reduce mortality rates. While we do not anticipate that travel and consumer behaviour will return to pre-pandemic levels in the near term, as consumer confidence recovers, the recovery is expected to gradually broaden from manufacturing-led industries to consumption and service sectors. This will be particularly evident in countries with younger populations.

source_text:
我對友邦保險的長遠未來前景充滿信心。儘管面對短期不明朗因素，但帶動需求的本土因素強勁，加上亞洲的主
要人口結構趨勢，仍為友邦保險業務的長遠前景提供正面的結構性支持。在大眾收入增加、私人保險滲透率偏
低，以及社會福利覆蓋有限的情況下，市場對友邦保險產品的需求將繼續增長。我們將憑藉龐大的競爭優勢和強
勁的增長往績，為社區創建更可持續的未來，並為所有持分者創造共享價值。

initial_translation: I am confident about AIA's long-term prospects. Despite near-term uncertainties, strong domestic drivers of demand, coupled with key demographic trends across Asia, continue to provide positive structural support for AIA's long-term business outlook. With rising incomes, low private insurance penetration, and limited social welfare coverage, demand for AIA's products will continue to grow. Leveraging our substantial competitive advantages and strong track record of growth, we will build a more sustainable future for our communities and create shared value for all our stakeholders.

source_text:
在2020年，友邦保險在全球大流行病帶來的空前商業和宏觀經濟狀況下錄得強勁的財務表現。儘管外出限制導致
2020年新業務價值下降，但隨著業務的調整和限制的有所放寬，我們看到了銷售勢頭的恢復。這種勢頭一直持續
到2021年，首兩個月新業務價值與2020年同期相比增長15%。多年來，我們審慎的財務管理和貫徹對高質素業務
的策略性重點，體現了稅後營運溢利和產生的基本自由盈餘的持續增長、穩健而強韌的資本狀況以及每股股息的

initial_translation: In 2020, AIA recorded strong financial performance amid the unprecedented business and macroeconomic conditions brought about by the global pandemic. Although external mobility restrictions led to a decline in VONB in 2020, as business adjusted and restrictions eased, we saw a recovery in sales momentum. This momentum continued into 2021, with VONB in the first two months growing 15% compared to the same period in 2020. Over the years, our prudent financial management and consistent strategic focus on high-quality business have been reflected in continued growth in OPAT and UFSG, a robust and resilient capital position, and dividend per share
compact_translation: In 2020, AIA recorded strong financial performance amid unprecedented pandemic-driven business and macroeconomic conditions. Although mobility restrictions reduced VONB in 2020, recovery in sales momentum followed as business adjusted and restrictions eased, continuing into 2021 with VONB growing 15% in the first two months versus 2020. Our prudent financial management and consistent strategic focus on high-quality business have delivered continued OPAT and UFSG growth, robust capital position, and increased dividend per share
final_translation: In 2020, AIA recorded strong financial performance amid unprecedented pandemic-driven business and macroeconomic conditions. Although mobility restrictions reduced VONB in 2020, recovery in sales momentum followed as business adjusted and restrictions eased, continuing into 2021 with VONB growing 15% in the first two months versus 2020. Our prudent financial management and consistent strategic focus on high-quality business have delivered continued OPAT and UFSG growth, robust capital position, and increased dividend per share

source_text:
大流行病對我們2020年財務表現的主要影響是對新業務銷售的影響，原因在於我們眾多市場的遏制傳播措施限制
了面對面的銷售活動，尤其是在2020年上半年。儘管2020年的新業務價值27.65億美元較2019年減少了33%，我
們迅速採用了新的數碼工具，並且外出限制的普遍放寬支持了銷售勢頭的恢復。友邦保險中國業務為2020年本集

initial_translation: The pandemic's principal impact on our 2020 financial performance was on new business sales, as containment measures across many of our markets restricted face-to-face sales activities, particularly in the first half of 2020. Although VONB of US$2.765 billion in 2020 decreased by 33% compared to 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools, and the widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported a recovery in sales momentum. AIA China

團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，也是我們第一個顯示銷售勢頭有所恢復的報告分部，原因在於該地區自2020年3
月逐步放寬嚴格的封鎖。撇除維持低位的中國內地訪港旅客銷售額，本集團其他分部的新業務價值在下半年強勁
復甦，與上半年相比增長了23%。本集團的新業務發展勢頭在2021年持續強勁，首兩個月新業務價值較2020年同
期高出15%。

initial_translation: contributed the largest share to the Group's VONB and was also our first reporting segment to demonstrate a recovery in sales momentum, as this region began to gradually ease strict lockdowns from March 2020 onwards. Excluding sales from Mainland Chinese visitors, which remained at low levels, the Group's other segments showed strong recovery in VONB in the second half, growing 23% compared to the first half. The Group's new business momentum remained robust into 2021, with VONB in the first two months 15% higher than the corresponding period in 2020.

Excluding low-level sales from Mainland Chinese visitors, the Group's other segments showed strong VONB recovery in the second half, growing 23% versus the first half. The Group's new business momentum remained robust into 2021, with VONB in the first two months 15% higher than the corresponding 2020 period.

source_text:
我們的高質素、經常性盈利來源以及對有效保單組合的積極管理，帶動稅後營運溢利增長了5%至59.42億美元，
並使營運溢利率穩定在16.9%。所收取的續保保費增加了10%，經常性保費總額佔2020年所收取保費的90%以
上。稅後營運溢利增長受益於全年顯著正面理賠經驗，其抵銷了新固定收入投資的收益率下跌及假設長期股權投
資回報減少的影響。一如預期，上半年所述的異常正面醫療理賠經驗並未在下半年再次發生，但我們繼續看到此
來源對稅後營運溢利增長的正面貢獻。在友邦保險泰國業務的失效經驗恢復正常的情況下，下半年的續保率有所
改善，而本集團的續保率為95%。

initial_translation: Our high-quality, recurring earnings sources and active management of our in-force portfolio drove OPAT growth of 5% to US$5.942 billion, while maintaining an operating margin of 16.9%. Renewal premiums collected increased by 10%, with recurring premiums representing over 90% of total premiums collected in 2020. OPAT growth benefited from significant positive claims experience throughout the year, which offset the decline in yields on new fixed income investments and the impact of reduced assumed long-term equity investment returns. As expected, the exceptional positive medical claims experience noted in the first half did not recur in the second half, but we continued to see positive contributions to OPAT growth from this source. With AIA's Thailand business lapse experience normalizing, persistency improved in the second half, with the Group's persistency at 95%.
compact_translation: Our high-quality, recurring earnings sources and active portfolio management drove OPAT growth of 5% to US$5.942 billion, maintaining an operating margin of 16.9%. Renewal premiums increased 10%, with recurring premiums representing over 90% of 2020 total premiums collected. OPAT growth benefited from significant positive claims experience throughout the year, offsetting lower yields on new fixed income investments and reduced assumed long-term equity returns. The exceptional positive medical claims experience in the first half did not recur in the second half, though positive contributions to OPAT growth continued from this source. With AIA's Thailand business lapse experience normalizing, persistency improved in the second half to 95% Group-wide.
final_translation: Our high-quality, recurring earnings sources and active management of our in-force portfolio drove OPAT growth of 5% to US$5.942 billion, while maintaining an operating margin of 16.9%. Renewal premiums collected increased by 10%, with recurring premiums representing over 90% of total premiums collected in 2020. OPAT growth benefited from significant positive claims experience throughout the year, which offset the decline in yields on new fixed income investments and the impact of reduced assumed long-term equity investment returns. As expected, the exceptional positive medical claims experience noted in the first half did not recur in the second half, but we continued to see positive contributions to OPAT growth from this source. With AIA's Thailand business lapse experience normalizing, persistency improved in the second half, with the Group's persistency at 95%.

source_text:
於2020年12月31日，我們的主要營運公司友邦保險有限公司（AIA Co.）的償付能力充足率仍然非常強勁，為
489%。於2020年12月31日，在新的集團監管框架下，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為374%。日後，我們將披露集
團當地資本總和法覆蓋率，作為衡量本集團監管償付能力的主要指標。

initial_translation: As at 31 December 2020, our principal operating company AIA Co.'s solvency ratio remained very strong at 489%. As at 31 December 2020, under the new Group regulatory framework, the Group LCSM cover ratio was 374%. Going forward, we will disclose the Group LCSM cover ratio as the primary measure of the Group's regulatory solvency position.
final_translation: As at 31 December 2020, our principal operating company AIA Co.'s solvency ratio remained very strong at 489%. As at 31 December 2020, under the new Group regulatory framework, the Group LCSM cover ratio was 374%. Going forward, we will disclose the Group LCSM cover ratio as the primary measure of the Group's regulatory solvency position.

source_text:
董事會建議末期股息增加7.5%至每股100.30港仙，並須於本公司應屆股東週年大會上獲股東批准。這使2020年的
全年股息總額為每股135.30港仙，較2019年的全年股息總額上升6.9%。這是秉承友邦保險行之已久的審慎、可持
續及漸進的派息政策，讓集團可把握未來的增長機遇，並且保持財務靈活性。

neighbor_context.next_group_source_excerpt:
我們仍然對友邦保險在整個亞洲地區的業務機會充滿信心。我們將繼續專注於投資資本，以實現具盈利的新業務
增長，並運用我們的競爭優勢，同時維持審慎的財務管理和實現長期股東價值。

matched_terms.evidence:
董事會建議末期股息增加7.5%至每股100.30港仙，並須於本公司應屆股東週年大會上獲股東批准。這使2020年的
全年股息總額為每股135.30港仙，較2019年的全年股息總額上升6.9%。這是秉承友邦保險行之已久的審慎、可持
續及漸進的派息政策，讓集團可把握未來的增長機遇，並且保持財務靈活性。

initial_translation: The Board recommends an increase in the final dividend of 7.5% to 100.30 Hong Kong cents per share, subject to approval by shareholders at the Company's forthcoming Annual General Meeting. This brings the total dividend for 2020 to 135.30 Hong Kong cents per share, representing an increase of 6.9% compared to the total dividend for 2019. This reflects AIA's long-established prudent, sustainable and progressive dividend policy, which enables the Group to capitalize on future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.
compact_translation: The Board recommends a 7.5% increase in final dividend to 100.30 Hong Kong cents per share, subject to shareholder approval at the forthcoming Annual General Meeting. Total 2020 dividend reaches 135.30 Hong Kong cents per share, up 6.9% from 2019. This reflects AIA's long-established prudent, sustainable and progressive dividend policy, enabling the Group to capitalize on future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.

This brings the total dividend for 2020 to 135.30 Hong Kong cents per share, representing an increase of 6.9% compared to the total dividend for 2019. This reflects AIA's long-established prudent, sustainable and progressive dividend policy, which enables the Group to capitalize on future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.

source_text:
儘管2020年的新業務價值27.65億美元較2019年減少了33%，我們迅速採用了新的數碼工具，並且外出限制的普
遍放寬支持了銷售勢頭的恢復。友邦保險中國業務為2020年本集團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，也是我們第一個
顯示銷售勢頭有所恢復的報告分部，原因在於該地區自2020年3月逐步放寬嚴格的封鎖。撇除維持低位的中國內
地訪港旅客銷售額，本集團其他分部的新業務價值在下半年強勁復甦，與上半年相比增長了23%。本集團的新業
務發展勢頭在2021年持續強勁，首兩個月新業務價值較2020年同期高出15%。

initial_translation: Although VONB of US$2,765 million in 2020 decreased by 33% compared to 2019, we swiftly adopted new digital tools, and the widespread relaxation of travel restrictions supported the recovery of sales momentum. AIA China contributed the most to the Group's VONB in 2020 and was the first reporting segment to demonstrate recovery in sales momentum, as the region progressively relaxed strict lockdowns from March 2020 onwards. Excluding the subdued sales from mainland Chinese visitors to Hong Kong, VONB in the Group's other segments rebounded strongly in the second half, growing by 23% compared to the first half. The Group's new business development momentum remained robust in 2021, with VONB in the first two months up by 15% compared to the same period in 2020.
compact_translation: Although VONB of US$2,765 million in 2020 decreased 33% from 2019, swift adoption of digital tools and widespread relaxation of travel restrictions supported sales momentum recovery. AIA China contributed most to Group VONB in 2020 and was the first segment demonstrating recovery, as the region progressively relaxed lockdowns from March 2020. Excluding subdued mainland Chinese visitor sales to Hong Kong, other segments' VONB rebounded strongly in H2, growing 23% versus H1. Group new business momentum remained robust in 2021, with VONB in the first two months up 15% versus the same period in 2020.
final_translation: Although VONB of US$2,765 million in 2020 decreased 33% from 2019, swift adoption of digital tools and widespread relaxation of travel restrictions supported sales momentum recovery. AIA China contributed most to Group VONB in 2020 and was the first segment demonstrating recovery, as the region progressively relaxed lockdowns from March 2020. Excluding subdued mainland Chinese visitor sales to Hong Kong, other segments' VONB rebounded strongly in H2, growing 23% versus H1. Group new business momentum remained robust in 2021, with VONB in the first two months up 15% versus the same period in 2020.

source_text:
友邦保險中國業務在2021年錄得成功的勢頭，首兩個月的新業務價值與2020年同期比較，錄得非常強勁的增
長。2020年新業務價值9.68億美元較2019年減少17%，主要由於2019冠狀病毒病在第一季爆發初期而導致銷售額
有限。隨著外出限制放寬，新業務動力得以迅速改善。新業務價值重拾我們慣常的季節性規律，比重更側重於上
半年。在2020年，友邦保險中國業務為集團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻。

initial_translation: AIA China achieved strong momentum in 2021, with VONB in the first two months recording very robust growth compared to the same period in 2020. VONB of US$968 million in 2020 decreased by 17% compared to 2019, primarily due to limited sales in the early stages of the COVID-19 outbreak in the first quarter. As travel restrictions were relaxed, new business momentum improved rapidly. VONB resumed our customary seasonal patterns, with a greater proportion concentrated in the first half of the year. In 2020, AIA China contributed the largest share to the Group's VONB.
compact_translation: AIA China achieved strong momentum in 2021, with VONB in the first two months recording very robust growth versus 2020. VONB of US$968 million in 2020 decreased 17% from 2019, primarily due to limited sales during the early COVID-19 outbreak in Q1. As travel restrictions eased, new business momentum improved rapidly. VONB resumed customary seasonal patterns with greater concentration in H1. In 2020, AIA China contributed the largest share to Group VONB.
final_translation: AIA China achieved strong momentum in 2021, with VONB in the first two months recording very robust growth versus 2020. VONB of US$968 million in 2020 decreased 17% from 2019, primarily due to limited sales during the early COVID-19 outbreak in Q1. As travel restrictions eased, new business momentum improved rapidly. VONB resumed customary seasonal patterns with greater concentration in H1. In 2020, AIA China contributed the largest share to Group VONB.

source_text:
在實施旅遊限制後，友邦保險香港業務來自中國內地訪港客戶的新業務銷售自2020年2月初起實際上已暫停，導
致其新業務價值大幅下降。新業務價值利潤率錄得跌幅，反映新業務量減少導致承保開支超支、產品組合變動及
利率下降的影響所致。澳門在2020年9月底恢復中國內地旅客個人遊計劃。這為澳門的中國內地訪澳客戶銷售回
升提供支持，使其在第四季佔友邦保險澳門分公司的年化新保費總額超過三分之一。

initial_translation: Following the implementation of travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors to AIA Hong Kong were effectively suspended from early February 2020, resulting in a significant decline in VONB. The VONB margin recorded a decrease, reflecting the impact of reduced new business volume leading to underwriting expense overruns, changes in product mix, and the effect of lower interest rates. Macau resumed the Individual Visit Scheme for Mainland Chinese visitors in late September 2020. This provided support for the recovery of new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors in Macau, which accounted for more than one-third of the annualized new premiums of AIA Macau in the fourth quarter.
compact_translation: Following travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors to AIA Hong Kong were effectively suspended from early February 2020, causing significant VONB decline. VONB margin decreased due to reduced new business volume, underwriting expense overruns, product mix changes, and lower interest rates. Macau resumed the Individual Visit Scheme for Mainland Chinese visitors in late September 2020, supporting new business sales recovery from Mainland visitors, which exceeded one-third of AIA Macau's annualized new premiums in Q4.
